title: Massie Is Defeated in Kentucky, Falling to a Trump-Backed Challenger
description: Representative Thomas Massie, President Trump’s chief G.O.P. antagonist in the House, lost to Ed Gallrein, Mr. Trump’s handpicked candidate.
author: Robert Draper

title: Early War Goal Was to Install Hard Line Former President as Iran’s Leader
description: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest in Tehran, U.S. officials said, was part of an effort to bring about regime change and put him in power.
author: Mark Mazzetti, Julian E. Barnes, Farnaz Fassihi and Ronen Bergman

title: Sen. Gillibrand of New York Clashes With Sean Duffy Over Funding Freeze
description: Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, Democrat of New York, criticized the transportation secretary, Sean Duffy, for posting a video that bragged about withholding money from the state.
author: Chris Cameron

title: I.R.S. to Drop Audits of Trump and Family
description: As part of the Justice Department’s compensation fund deal, officials vowed not to pursue any matters, including those involving President Trump’s tax returns, that are pending.
author: Alan Feuer, Andrew Duehren and Glenn Thrush

title: With Trump’s Settlement, a Possible $100 Million I.R.S. Penalty Melts Away
description: The tax service argued that the Trump Organization tried to claim the same losses twice. The president said the audit was a “disgrace.”
author: Russ Buettner

title: Minnesota Becomes First State to Ban Prediction Markets
description: Like at least other 14 states, Minnesota has wrestled with how to regulate the popular prediction market sites. Federal officials sued the state over its new law.
author: Pooja Salhotra

title: What to Know About the Republican Senate Primary in Alabama
description: Three leading contenders, including a Trump-backed congressman, are aiming to replace Senator Tommy Tuberville. The winner will be favored in November.
author: Tim Balk

title: Andy Barr Wins Republican Primary for McConnell’s Seat in Kentucky
description: Mr. Barr, who serves in the House, consolidated support among Republicans in part by securing the endorsement of President Trump.
author: Nick Corasaniti

title: 5 Things to Know About Buddy Carter, Republican Senate Candidate in Georgia
description: The congressman is a Trump acolyte who has found some common ground with Democrats on energy issues.
author: Tim Balk

title: Key Areas to Watch in Georgia’s Republican Senate Primary
description: Three candidates are jockeying for position in a race that is likely to result in a runoff.
author: Caroline Soler

title: Senate Votes to Take Up Measure to Force Trump to End Iran War
description: With four Republican backers, Democrats won a vote to advance a resolution that would force the president to end hostilities or win authorization from Congress.
author: Megan Mineiro

title: 5 Things to Know About Mike Collins, Republican Senate Candidate in Georgia
description: The congressman is a Trump acolyte who has a history of incendiary social media posts.
author: Tim Balk

title: 5 Things to Know About Derek Dooley, Republican Senate Candidate in Georgia
description: Mr. Dooley is a former football coach running in the Republican primary with the support of Gov. Brian Kemp.
author: Tim Balk

title: 5 Things to Know About Jon Ossoff, Democratic Senate Candidate in Georgia
description: He is the youngest member of the Senate and once volunteered for the civil rights leader John Lewis’s congressional office.
author: Tim Balk

title: Under a Cloud of Uncertainty, Alabama Voters Head to the Polls
description: Voters in Alabama cast their ballots, unsure about whether a recent Supreme Court decision would change their congressional districts going forward.
author: Emily Cochrane

title: What the Senate Primary Polls Tell Us in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky
description: The Republican primaries in all three states are expected to be competitive, with two of them likely to advance to runoff elections.
author: Caroline Soler and Alex Lemonides

title: Blanche Defends $1.8 Billion Fund as Skepticism Mounts
description: The acting attorney general told lawmakers the fund would review claims from an array of people, not just Republicans.
author: Devlin Barrett

title: Kentucky Primary Election: Key Areas to Watch
description: In a contentious House race, Representative Thomas Massie will look for strength in the Cincinnati suburbs.
author: Christine Zhang

title: 5 Things to Know About Thomas Massie, Republican House Candidate in Kentucky
description: President Trump has backed his primary challenger, seeking to oust the libertarian-leaning congressman and longtime antagonist.
author: Tim Balk

title: Two friends are split over who should represent their Kentucky district.
author: Ginny Whitehouse
